overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a character in a heavy coat walking through a foggy swamp at dawn. The character traverses shallow water, tall grass, and rocky terrain while atmospheric god rays pierce through the mist, eventually approaching a distant campfire in the wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty swamp with shallow stream and tall reeds

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow swamp water surrounded by dense reeds and cattails

entered.detail: reflective water surface with ripples and mud
dense cattails and marsh grass lining the waterway
dense cattails and marsh grass lining the waterway
tall evergreen trees silhouetted against the foggy sky with god rays

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, foggy swamp channel with shallow water reflecting the dim dawn light. Tall reeds line both sides of the stream while pine trees stand silhouetted in the misty background, pierced by dramatic shafts of light.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow between swamp and forest

events.description: character steps out of shallow water onto grassy bank, leaving the swamp channel

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass field moving steadily away from the swamp water toward higher ground

entered.detail: tall brown grass and wildflowers covering the ground
large moss-covered boulders visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the water, the character moves through an open grassy meadow with tall brown grass swaying in the mist. The swamp reeds recede into the background as the terrain gradually rises, with large rock formations becoming visible on the right horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky approach to forest camp with visible firelight

events.description: warm campfire light becomes visible through the fog and trees on the right side

agents.ego_description: approaching rocky terrain and observing a distant camp with firelight glowing through the mist

notable_agents.action: figures gathered around a campfire in the distance, barely visible through the fog

entered.detail: moss-covered boulders and rocky ground in the path
warm orange light source glowing through the fog and trees

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a rocky area with large boulders scattered across the path. Through the fog on the right, the warm glow of a distant campfire becomes visible, suggesting a camp or settlement ahead. The terrain becomes rockier as the character moves toward the light source.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim, foggy swamp that gradually opens into a rocky wilderness illuminated by a distant fire. It begins with the character navigating a narrow channel of shallow water, where tall reeds and silhouetted pine trees are pierced by dramatic shafts of dawn light. As the character exits the water, the scene shifts into an open meadow of swaying brown grass while the swampy terrain recedes and large rock formations emerge on the horizon. The camera then follows the character onto a rugged path scattered with boulders, where the cool mist begins to blend with the warm glow of a campfire appearing through the fog. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly rocky as the character moves steadily toward the flickering light source.
